subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim to the Sacred Threshold! Even as a Turkish tax-collector, Shoghi Effendi compelleth me insistently to write without any other recourse
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر عتبه مقدسه شوقی افندی نظیرِ محصّل قاجار به تحریرِ ناچار اصرار می‌نماید
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @the concourse on high
